name: shared-resource-conflict
description: Two projects competing for the same resource (developer time)

seedMemories.title: Project Alpha deadline
seedMemories.content: Project Alpha must ship by June 15. Sarah is the lead developer.

seedMemories.title: Project Beta kickoff
seedMemories.content: Project Beta needs to start by May 1. Requires full-stack developer - Sarah is the best candidate.

seedMemories.title: Sarah's availability
seedMemories.content: Sarah mentioned she can only handle one major project at a time.

query: How should I staff Project Beta without derailing Project Alpha?
